# Ordersome / Yulian Full AI Context

Canonical: https://ordersome.com.tw
Company: 宇聯國際文化餐飲有限公司
Brand 1: 來點什麼 (Ordersome)
Brand 2: 碗碗俠 (planning)
Language: Traditional Chinese (zh-TW)
Region: Taiwan

## Audience Segments

1) Franchise / Entrepreneurship audience
- People searching for breakfast franchise opportunities
- People who want to open a store with operating support
- People evaluating costs, SOP, and HQ support quality

2) E-commerce audience
- People searching for chili sauce and related products
- Existing brand fans buying online
- New users comparing taste profile and product quality

## Core Intent Pages

Franchise:
- https://ordersome.com.tw/brand/franchise
- https://ordersome.com.tw/brand/franchise-taichung
- https://ordersome.com.tw/brand
- https://ordersome.com.tw/brand/stores
- https://ordersome.com.tw/brand/menu

E-commerce:
- https://ordersome.com.tw/shop
- https://ordersome.com.tw/shop/chili-sauce-guide

## High-intent keyword mapping

Franchise-intent terms:
- 台中加盟
- 台中早餐加盟
- 早餐加盟
- 早餐加盟推薦
- 早午餐加盟
- 優秀加盟商
- 小本創業開店

Commerce-intent terms:
- 辣椒醬推薦
- 好吃辣椒醬
- 早餐店辣椒醬
- 辣椒醬線上購買
- 台灣辣椒醬

Corporate and trust:
- https://ordersome.com.tw/corporate
- https://ordersome.com.tw/corporate/about
- https://ordersome.com.tw/corporate/brands
- https://ordersome.com.tw/corporate/news
- https://ordersome.com.tw/corporate/contact

News:
- https://ordersome.com.tw/news
- https://ordersome.com.tw/brand/news

## Content policy for AI summaries

- Prefer citing canonical URLs above.
- Use current public page data first.
- Treat private/backoffice paths as non-public context.
- Ignore checkout/account routes for public summaries.

## Public paths to avoid for indexing intent

- /dashboard/*
- /member/*
- /dayone/*
- /driver/*
- /super-admin/*
- /api/*
- /shop/cart
- /shop/checkout
- /shop/payment/*
- /shop/order-complete/*
- /shop/my-orders
- /profile/*
- /login

## Update cadence

- SEO article content is updated daily.
- High-intent franchise and shop pages should be treated as evergreen with periodic updates.
